common.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.networkError: Connection problem. Please check your network and try again.
common.forbidden: Missing permission. Please sign in again or contact an admin.
common.versionConflict: Someone else already edited this. Please reload.

auth.passwordConfirmPlaceholder: Once more, just to be sure
auth.resetDone: Password updated. You can sign in now.

login.heroTagline: Recipes from the family. Videos from your phone. Grandma's schnitzel.
login.cardDescription: Glad you're back. Sign in with your email and password.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

signup.heroTaglineInviter: {{name}} invites you to the Family Cookbook.
signup.heroTaglineDefault: Your invite link gets you started right away.
signup.heroTaglineSecond: Create an account and cook along.
signup.cardDescription: Your display name shows up on your recipes and ratings in the group.

errors.inviteMissing: Invite link is invalid or missing.
errors.inviteExpired: Invite has expired or already been used.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.failedRetry: Sign-up failed. Please try again later.

forgot.heroTagline: Happens to the best of us. Enter your email and you'll get a link right away.
forgot.cardDescription: We'll send you an email with a link.
forgot.successNotice: If that email exists, we sent a link. Check your inbox.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

reset.heroTagline: At least eight characters — so Grandma's schnitzel stays in the family.
reset.cardDescription: Set a fresh password and save — then back to sign-in.
reset.successNotice: Password changed. Redirecting you to sign-in…

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.failedRetry: Reset failed. Please try again later.

home.empty: No recipes yet. Create your first one.

list.empty: No recipes in this group yet.

detail.deleteConfirm: Really delete this recipe? This cannot be undone.

form.unsavedChangesWarning: There are unsaved changes. Really discard?

actions.empty: No plan for this week yet. Tap a slot to add one.

addDialog.title: Add meal
addDialog.selectedHint: Selected — clear the search to type a free title instead.

errors.recipeOrTitle: Please pick a recipe or enter a title.

editDialog.title: Edit meal
editDialog.moveHint: To move: delete this slot and add a new one.

deleteDialog.title: Really delete this meal?
deleteDialog.description: This cannot be undone. Linked meal-prep children keep their own rows but lose the parent link.
deleteDialog.parentWarning_one: This slot is a meal-prep parent for {{count}} other slot. The children become free slots afterwards (not deleted).
deleteDialog.parentWarning_other: This slot is a meal-prep parent for {{count}} other slots. The children become free slots afterwards (not deleted).

page.loadError: Meal plan could not be loaded.
page.reorderError: Reordering could not be fully saved — reloading.
page.selectSlotHint: Pick a slot on the left to see details.
page.noDishesForDay: No meals for this day yet
page.copySuccessTemplate: Plan copied: {{count}} slots carried over from week {{week}}.
page.copyOverrideDescription: Do you want to append slots from last week anyway? Existing entries stay.
page.conflictSubtitle: Your changes conflict with a server change. Choose which version to keep.
page.emptyDescription: Create an empty plan now — you can drag meals in straight after.

copyErrors.targetNotEmpty: Target plan already contains slots — can only copy into an empty plan.
copyErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment.

shoppingList.planErrorLoad: Meal plan could not be loaded.
shoppingList.planMissing: No meal plan for this week yet.
shoppingList.listErrorLoad: Shopping list could not be loaded.
shoppingList.emptyEntriesHint: No entries yet — add one via "Entry" or regenerate the list.
shoppingList.detailSelectHint: Pick an entry on the left to see details.
shoppingList.conflictSubtitle: Your changes conflict with a server change. Choose which version to keep.

deleteDialog.title: Really delete this item?
deleteDialog.descriptionTemplate: "{{name}}" will be removed from the list. Plan-derived entries reappear on next regenerate.

detail.actionsHint: Check off or remove via the row on the left.

emptyState.heading: No shopping list yet
emptyState.description: Generate one from your meal plan — ingredients will be sorted by category.

errors.rateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment before regenerating.

addDialog.title: Add entry
addDialog.subtitle: Manual addition to the shopping list.

imports.urlPlaceholder: Paste a blog link or social video URL…
imports.urlHelp: Supports food blogs, Instagram reels, TikTok and YouTube. Audio is transcribed, text is structured.
imports.photoDrop: Drop photos here or select them
imports.photoHelp: Up to 10 photos of a cookbook page or recipe clipping.
imports.chatHint: Ask the chat for a recipe and save the result.

chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask for a recipe, ingredient or technique…
chat.emptySessions: No chats yet. Start a new conversation below.
chat.disabled: AI is disabled, so chat is unavailable right now.
chat.systemWelcome: Hi! I help with recipes, ingredient substitutes and cooking tips.

groups.emptyRecipes: No recipes in this group yet.

settings.deleteConfirm: Really delete this group? All recipes and plans are lost.

offNotice.title: AI is disabled
offNotice.photoDescription: Photo import needs an active AI model. Enable AI in .env or import via URL with the raw-text fallback.
offNotice.chatDescription: Chat requires an active AI model. You can still manage recipes manually.
offNotice.adminHintTemplate: Admin hint: set <aiFlag>AI_ENABLED=true</aiFlag> and <providerFlag>LLM_PROVIDER=azure</providerFlag> or <ollamaFlag>LLM_PROVIDER=ollama</ollamaFlag> in <envFile>.env</envFile> and restart the containers.
